kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

test.name: Scenario: Page Title Should Be Swag Labs

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.name: Scenario: Products Heading Should Be Visible

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.name: Scenario: Product List Should Not Be Empty

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.name: Scenario: Each Product Should Have Valid Price Format

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

test.name: Scenario: Each Product Should Have Description

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = carry.allTheThings() with the sleek, streamlined Sly Pack that melds uncompromising style with unequaled laptop and tablet protection.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = A red light isn't the desired state in testing but it sure helps when riding your bike at night. Water-resistant with 3 lighting modes, 1 AAA battery included.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = Get your testing superhero on with the Sauce Labs bolt T-shirt. From American Apparel, 100% ringspun combed cotton, heather gray with red bolt.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = It's not every day that you come across a midweight quarter-zip fleece jacket capable of handling everything from a relaxing day outdoors to a busy day at the office.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = Rib snap infant onesie for the junior automation engineer in development. Reinforced 3-snap bottom closure, two-needle hemmed sleeved and bottom won't unravel.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = This classic Sauce Labs t-shirt is perfect to wear when cozying up to your keyboard to automate a few tests. Super-soft and comfy ringspun combed cotton.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

test.name: Scenario: Each Product Should Have Image

kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Scenario: Sort Items By Name A To Z

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'class:product_sort_container' by value az.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Copy List
kw.msg: ${expected_names} = ['Sauce Labs Backpack', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)']
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given list.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Reverse List
kw.doc: Reverses the given list in place.

kw.name: Lists Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if given lists are unequal.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Remove String
kw.doc: Removes all ``removables`` from the given ``string``.

kw.name: Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Copy List
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given list.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Reverse List
kw.doc: Reverses the given list in place.

kw.name: Lists Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if given lists are unequal.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

test.name: Scenario: Access Inventory Without Login Should Redirect

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
